# Vila Zizel Full AI Context

Vila Zizel is a handmade Mediterranean accommodation estate in Analipsi, Messenia, Greece. It offers rooms and apartments on a 4,000 m2 garden property close to Chrysi Ammos beach. The design is inspired by the 12 Gods of Olympus, and each accommodation option is named after a Greek deity.

## Property Overview

The estate is recently renovated, fenced, lit at night, and arranged as independent buildings. Guests can expect a natural garden setting, parking, WiFi, air conditioning, kitchen amenities, and access to nearby beaches and Messinian attractions.

The host is Herman, a builder and farmer with years of hosting experience. He speaks English, Greek, and Italian.

## Location

Vila Zizel is located in Analipsi 240 01, Messenia, Greece.

Coordinates: 37.008445596599785, 21.969529643030935.

Nearby points of interest include Analipsi Beach, Chrysi Ammos, Ancient Messene, Polylimnio Waterfalls, and Kalamata International Airport.

## Rooms And Apartments

### Aphrodite Room

Aphrodite includes a bedroom with a king-size bed and TV, a bathroom, a kitchen-dining room with two single beds, a small terrace, internet, and air conditioning.

### Hera Room

Hera has a view of nature, a kitchen with essentials, a bedroom with air conditioning and TV, an additional single bed, a bathroom with private washing machine, and an outdoor table.

### Poseidon-Hera Unit

Poseidon-Hera is a flexible unit that can be separated or combined. It includes two bedrooms, each with a double bed and TV, two equipped kitchens, two dining areas, two bathrooms, and additional single or drawer beds.

### Zeus Apartment

Zeus includes an equipped kitchen, dining room, large built-in living room with TV and air conditioning, two bedrooms, bathroom, drying rack, and a large terrace with views.

### Athina Room

Athina includes a built-in double bed connected to a dining and kitchen area, a bathroom, WiFi, air conditioning, and an outdoor area for relaxing in nature.

### Artemis Room

Artemis includes a king-size bed, a kitchen connected to the bedroom, a bathroom, and outdoor nature space.
